ddls:
CREATE TABLE "documents" (
  "document_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "document_title" TEXT /* Title of the document */,
  "document_description" TEXT /* Description or summary of the document */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the document */,
  "data_sheet_status" TEXT /* Current status of the data sheet (e.g., Product data sheet) */,
  "change_notice" TEXT /* Details of change notices associated with the document */,
  "supersedes" TEXT /* Identifier of the document that this document supersedes */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Category ID for categorization */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the document */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the document was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last modified the document */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the document was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "modifications" (
  "modification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each modification entry */,
  "document_id" TEXT /* Reference to the document being modified */,
  "modification_details" TEXT /* Detailed description of modifications */,
  "modification_date" TEXT /* Date when the modification was made */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who made the modification */,
  "approval_status" TEXT /* Status of the modification (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the modification was approved or rejected */,
  "approval_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who approved or rejected the modification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("modification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_modifications_document_id FOREIGN KEY ("document_id") REFERENCES documents ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_modifications_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_modifications_approval_by FOREIGN KEY ("approval_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, manager, admin) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Role ID for role assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "document_id" TEXT /* ID of the document being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the document */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the document was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the document */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the document */,
  "session_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the session in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_document_id FOREIGN KEY ("document_id") REFERENCES documents ("document_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, editor, viewer) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Description of the permissions associated with the role */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the role is a default role for new users */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the role was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the role was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_versioning" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version entry */,
  "document_id" TEXT /* Reference to the document */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the document */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of this version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the version */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "is_current" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the version is the current version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_versioning_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_versioning_document_id FOREIGN KEY ("document_id") REFERENCES documents ("document_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Product data sheet, Change notice) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the category is active */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the category was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the category was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attachments" (
  "attachment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attachment */,
  "document_id" TEXT /* Reference to the document the attachment relates to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the attachment file */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., PDF, image) */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the attachment was uploaded */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the attachment in bytes */,
  "download_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the attachment has been downloaded */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the attachment is public or private */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attachment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attachments_document_id FOREIGN KEY ("document_id") REFERENCES documents ("document_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user to be notified */,
  "document_id" TEXT /* Document related to the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date of the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the notification has been read */,
  "read_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_document_id FOREIGN KEY ("document_id") REFERENCES documents ("document_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trails" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "document_id" TEXT /* ID of the document that was changed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date when the action was taken */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user making the change */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to make the change */,
  "is_major_change" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the change is a major change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_document_id FOREIGN KEY ("document_id") REFERENCES documents ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "document_id" TEXT /* Reference to the document associated with the tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag for categorization */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the tag was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the tag was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_tags_document_id FOREIGN KEY ("document_id") REFERENCES documents ("document_id")
)
